# two-judge-quorum

Codex judge output have `STATUS=ERROR` as first meaningful line. Whole output ineligible per protocol (`dialectic-protocol.md` "Eligible" note, Threshold Rules). Leave cursor + claude as eligible judges. DECISION_1 hit 2-voter unanimous row. DECISION_2 hit 2-voter 1-1 tie row (→ `fallback-to-synthesis`, reason `1-1 tie with 2 voters`).
